gt_sql: SELECT T1.name, T1.year FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 on T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T2.milliseconds IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T2.milliseconds LIMIT 1
pred_sql: SELECT r.name, r.year FROM results res JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId WHERE res.milliseconds IS NOT NULL ORDER BY res.milliseconds ASC LIMIT 1;
question: Which race has the shortest actual finishing time? Please give the name and year.
